title: Best Worst Thing That Ever Could Have Happened
original_title: Best Worst Thing That Ever Could Have Happened...
overview: This film from acclaimed theater director Lonny Price charts the journey of the original cast of Stephen Sondheim's "Merrily We Roll Along" in the 30-plus years since the musical debuted on Broadway at the Alvin Theatre in 1981.
